# Docs And Readme Sync

When behavior, tooling, or workflows change:

- update `README.md` if the public entry points changed
- keep `docs/README.md` as the canonical documentation hub
- prefer structured docs under `docs/00-architecture` through `docs/04-development`
- keep legacy flat docs as compatibility pointers only
- use the canonical product name `JOOservices Laravel Controller`
- keep README examples free of direct Eloquent query examples
- document doctor command, formatter behavior, trace IDs, and non-goals when touched
